title: helichrysum congestum
intro: Helichrysum congestum, also known as the mountain silver daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of helichrysum congestum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin health, and supporting respiratory and digestive health. Helichrysum congestum is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, colds, and digestive problems.
